name: Egg Croquettes Malfel
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of celery soup (10 1/2 oz), condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 3 tablespoons soup with eggs, bread crumbs, parsley, onion, celery, salt, and pepper.
2. Chill mixture for 1 hour.
3. Form into 8 croquettes.
4. Roll croquettes in remaining bread crumbs.
5. Fry croquettes slowly in shortening until browned on all sides.
6. Combine remaining soup with milk and thyme. Heat.
7. Serve sauce over croquettes.
